title: ziziphus poilanei
intro: Ziziphus poilanei, also known as the Pailang Jujube, is a species of deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rhamnaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ziziphus poilanei include its ability to improve sleep quality, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Ziziphus poilanei is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and its herbal preparations are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
